mission.title: vitess: semantics: Use a BitSet
mission.description:
Following up on https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/11817 -- the bug was caused because our current implementation of `TableSet` is not strictly comparable with equality (i.e. `==`).

This PR fixes the issue in depth by bringing in a new implementation of an immutable bitset that is safe to compare with equality _and_ to be used as a key in a hashmap (something we also do quite often).

Fixes #11805 

cc @systay

resolution.summary: If a query contains more than 64 union statements, it fails with `bug: not supported pushWeightStringForDistinct on *planbuilder.limit` when using the Gen4 planner.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
